records.question: Which artist has the famous title Transmutation released exactly on January 21, 2008, and is named Ophiolatry?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
WHERE artist.famous_release_date = 'January 21, 2008' AND artist.artist = 'Ophiolatry' AND artist.famous_title = 'Transmutation'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Artist_ID FROM artist WHERE Famous_Release_date = 'January 21, 2008' AND Artist = 'Ophiolatry' AND Famous_Title = 'Transmutation'

records.question: What artists named Gorgoroth, aged at least 34, with the famous title Bergen 1996 and famous release date November 2007, had a volume issue 46:5 released on 9 May that stayed at least 1 week on top?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN volume ON artist.artist_id = volume.artist_id
WHERE volume.volume_issue = '46:5' AND volume.issue_date = '9 May' AND artist.artist = 'Gorgoroth' AND artist.age >= 34 AND artist.famous_title = 'Bergen 1996' AND volume.weeks_on_top >= 1.0 AND artist.famous_release_date = 'November 2007'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Artist_ID FROM artist AS T1 INNER JOIN volume AS T2 ON T1.Artist_ID = T2.Artist_ID WHERE T1.Artist = 'Gorgoroth' AND T1.Age >= 34 AND T1.Famous_Title = 'Bergen 1996' AND T1.Famous_Release_date = 'November 2007' AND T2.Volume_Issue = '46:5' AND T2.Issue_Date = '9 May' AND T2.Weeks_on_Top >= 1.0

records.question: Which artists with the famous title Bergen 1996 have volumes from issue 45:16 that spent at most 1.0 week on top?

records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Artist_ID FROM artist AS T1 INNER JOIN volume AS T2 ON T1.Artist_ID = T2.Artist_ID WHERE T1.Famous_Title = 'Bergen 1996' AND T2.Volume_Issue = '45:16' AND T2.Weeks_on_Top <= 1.0

records.question: Which artists named Black Flame, who are at most 18 years old and have the famous title Imperivm released exactly on June 23, 2008, appeared in volume 46:9 issued on 6 June with no more than 1.0 weeks on top?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN volume ON artist.artist_id = volume.artist_id
WHERE artist.age <= 18 AND volume.weeks_on_top <= 1.0 AND artist.artist = 'Black Flame' AND artist.famous_title = 'Imperivm' AND volume.volume_issue = '46:9' AND volume.issue_date = '6 June' AND artist.famous_release_date = 'June 23, 2008'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Artist_ID FROM artist AS T1 INNER JOIN volume AS T2 ON T1.Artist_ID = T2.Artist_ID WHERE T1.Age <= 18 AND T1.Artist = 'Black Flame' AND T1.Famous_Title = 'Imperivm' AND T1.Famous_Release_date = 'June 23, 2008' AND T2.Weeks_on_Top <= 1.0 AND T2.Volume_Issue = '46:9' AND T2.Issue_Date = '6 June'
